---
title: "William John Woollcombe"
---

## William John Woollcombe

**Dates:** (1832-1913)

### Description

brother of Robert and Richard Woollcombe

### Biography

He married (1861) Anne Catharina Pode (d. 1913), cousin of CMY and sister of Charlotte Cordelia (Pode) Yonge.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 19th 1891

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
